prompt: A spritesheet of 4x4 tiles for a fantasy strategy game. Mountain and special tiles. Rolling green hills, jagged high mountains, mountain peaks, swampy ground with murky water, dark corrupted land with cracks, magic blue glowing ground. Top-down view, 2D hand-painted style, Heroes of Might and Magic 3 aesthetic. Each tile is 256x256 pixels. Seamless when tiled. No text.
